message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantFontSize 14
skinparam participantFontStyle normal
skinparam participantFontName "Microsoft YaHei"
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam participantMargin 10
skinparam participantBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantCornerRadius 5
skinparam participantShadowing false
skinparam participantAlignment left
skinparam participantTextAlignment center
skinparam participantVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam participantHorizontalPadding 10
skinparam participantVerticalPadding 5
skinparam participantMinWidth 80
skinparam participantMaxWidth 200
skinparam participantMinHeight 40
skinparam participantMaxHeight 100
skinparam participantMinFontSize 12
skinparam participantMaxFontSize 16
skinparam participantMinFontStyle normal
skinparam participantMaxFontStyle bold
skinparam participantMinFontName "Microsoft YaHei"
skinparam participantMaxFontName "Arial"
skinparam participantMinFontColor #000000
skinparam participantMaxFontColor #000000
skinparam participantMinBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantMaxBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantMinBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantMaxBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantMinBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantMaxBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantMinCornerRadius 5
skinparam participantMaxCornerRadius 5
skinparam participantMinShadowing false
skinparam participantMaxShadowing false
skinparam participantMinAlignment left
skinparam participantMaxAlignment left
skinparam participantMinTextAlignment center
skinparam participantMaxTextAlignment center
skinparam participantMinVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam participantMaxVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam participantMinHorizontalPadding 10
skinparam participantMaxHorizontalPadding 10
skinparam participantMinVerticalPadding 5
skinparam participantMaxVerticalPadding 5
skinparam participantMinMinWidth 80
skinparam participantMaxMaxWidth 200
skinparam participantMinMinHeight 40
skinparam participantMaxMaxHeight 100
skinparam participantMinMinFontSize 12
skinparam participantMaxMaxFontSize 16
skinparam participantMinMinFontStyle normal
skinparam participantMaxMaxFontStyle bold
skinparam participantMinMinFontName "Microsoft YaHei"
skinparam participantMaxMaxFontName "Arial"
skinparam participantMinMinFontColor #000000
skinparam participantMaxMaxFontColor #000000
skinparam participantMinMinBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantMaxMaxBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantMinMinBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantMaxMaxBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantMinMinBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantMaxMaxBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantMinMinCornerRadius 5
skinparam participantMaxMaxCornerRadius 5
skinparam participantMinMinShadowing false
skinparam participantMaxMaxShadowing false
skinparam participantMinMinAlignment left
skinparam participantMaxMaxAlignment left
skinparam participantMinMinTextAlignment center
skinparam participantMaxMaxTextAlignment center
skinparam participantMinMinVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam participantMaxMaxVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam participantMinMinHorizontalPadding 10
skinparam participantMaxMaxHorizontalPadding 10
skinparam participantMinMinVerticalPadding 5
skinparam participantMaxMaxVerticalPadding 5

participant "管理员" as Admin
participant "教师管理" as TeacherManagement
participant "控制层" as Controller
participant "业务层" as Service
participant "持久层" as DAO

Admin -> TeacherManagement: 添加请求
TeacherManagement -> Controller: 输入相关信息，添加请求
Controller -> Service: 相关信息，请求登录
Service -> DAO: 相关信息，添加请求
DAO -> DAO: 根据相关信息添加
DAO --> Service: 返回添加对象
Service --> Controller: 返回添加对象
Controller --> TeacherManagement: 添加成功

@enduml
